title.rendered: ⭐ 101 Digital Marketing & Fundraising Best Practices for Nonprofits

content.rendered:
Website Design · Email Marketing · Online Fundraising · Social Media

101 Digital Marketing Best Practices for Nonprofits is a blog and webinar series (written and presented by Heather Mansfield) on website design, email marketing, online fundraising, and social media best practices for nonprofits, NGOs, and charities worldwide.

To be alerted new posts and webinars, please sign up for Nonprofit Tech for Good’s email newsletter. Thank you!

Website & Email Marketing Best Practices

10 Website Design Best Practices
10 Email Marketing Best Practices
10 Blogging Best Practices

10 Donation Page Best Practices
10 Online Fundraising Best Practices

Upcoming Webinars

January 21: Website & Email Marketing Best Practices for Nonprofits
February 17: Online Fundraising Best Practices for Nonprofits
March 17: Social Media Best Practices for Nonprofits

Certificate in Digital Marketing & Fundraising

Those who register and attend all three webinars in the series (Website & Email, Online Fundraising, and Social Media) will earn a Certificate of Completion in Digital Marketing & Fundraising from Nonprofit Tech for Good. The webinars only cost $20 each so that nonprofit professionals worldwide can earn the certificate without having to make a significant financial investment.

To earn the certificate, simply register for and attend all three webinars, save your receipts, and then request your certificate at the end of the third webinar. If you can not attend the webinar live, you will be sent a link to the recording and a set of notes 24-48 hours after the end of the webinar.
